completedPhaseClaims.summary: recipe_search skill end-to-end (config SST, prompt-contract, tool, skill+assembler with deterministic empty-graph Override, router normalize pre-pass, wiring), tests S01/S02/S03/S04 PASS via ./smackerel.sh test unit --go, S05 file in place (e2e build tag) pending live-stack run by bubbles.test.

executionHistory.summary: Filed BUG-061-003 from verbatim Telegram transcript. Reproduced via code-path trace: config/assistant/scenarios.yaml registers only 3 v1 skills (retrieval_qa, weather_query, notification_schedule); 'find best recepie' scores BandLow in internal/assistant/facade.go and lands on the StatusSavedAsIdea+CaptureRoute=true branch, which the Telegram adapter renders as '. Saved: "..." (idea)' — byte-for-byte match with the user-observed reply. Classified 5 sub-issues per design.md: #1 (recipe_search skill) and #2 (misspelling tolerance for recipe trigger set) STAY in this bug; #3 (slot resolve) and #4 (shopping list aggregation) are already implemented and covered as regression-only; #5 (meal-prep + shopping reminders) is a NEW feature gap routed to spec 036. All 8 bug artifacts created. Pre-fix regression test S02 (adversarial) not yet authored — that is the next agent's first deliverable per phaseOrder. Handoff to bubbles.design (Phase 3 review of design.md) then bubbles.implement.

Landed recipe_search skill across all 5 design.md touch sites (config SST + scenarios.yaml + prompt_contracts/recipe-search-v1.yaml + internal/agent/tools/recipesearch tool + internal/assistant/skills/recipesearch assembler with deterministic StatusUnavailable Override for empty-graph). Added Go-side closed-alias normalization (internal/agent/normalize.go) wired into router.Route before embed (envelope.RawInput preserved). Extended internal/assistant/contracts: SourceAssembly.Override + ResponseOverride + ErrNoMatch closed-vocabulary entry. Tests landed: normalize_test (alias map + router pre-pass adversarial), assembler_test (S01 + S03 adversarial empty-graph + non-OK guard), scenario_test (prompt-contract shape), bot_recipe_search_test (S04 adapter regression + adversarial regex). Manifest test extended for D7 (slash_shortcut=""). Pre-existing latent build issue in facade_source_assembly_integration_test.go (missing scenarioID arg) fixed as collateral. ./smackerel.sh config generate, check, test unit --go all exit 0. ./smackerel.sh test integration surfaced 3 unrelated failures (collateral fixed for one; the other two are environment-plumbing in spec 037 Scope 10 test and unrelated infra flakes — routed to bubbles.test). ./smackerel.sh test e2e not run; S05 file in place under tests/e2e/assistant_recipe_flow_test.go with skip on absent DATABASE_URL. Routing next to bubbles.test per bugfix-fastlane phaseOrder.

BLOCKING FINDING — recipe_search implementation NOT IN WORKING TREE. All files claimed by previous round (internal/agent/normalize.go, internal/agent/normalize_test.go, internal/assistant/skills/recipesearch/*, internal/telegram/assistant_adapter/bot_recipe_search_test.go, config/prompt_contracts/recipe-search-v1.yaml, tests/e2e/assistant_recipe_flow_test.go, plus the recipe_search lines in config/assistant/scenarios.yaml and config/smackerel.yaml) are absent on disk. Implementation is preserved in stash@{0} ('pre-deploy-fix-2-WIP') intermingled with non-bug-003 WIP. Live-stack integration first attempt failed because core container aborted startup with [F061-SCENARIO-MISSING] enable_sst_key 'assistant.skills.recipe_search.enabled' not in SST snapshot; I patched assistantEnableResolver to add the case, rebuilt + brought the stack healthy, and reran integration. Second-run integration FAIL with 4 unique test failures, ALL pre-existing / unrelated to recipe_search: TestAgentProviderDefaultModelTestOverride (SCOPE-06c cpu-tier vs older test expectation), TestCLIAuthPassthrough_* (docker absent in integration runner), TestScope10_ScenarioLint_RunsCleanOnRealTree (env-plumbing pre-existing on retrieval-qa-v1), TestDriveConfigGenerateAndRuntimeValidationStayInSync (assertion drift). My wiring fix to cmd/core/wiring_assistant_scenarios.go was also reverted by the workspace reset that removed the recipe_search files. S01–S05 CANNOT be verified. Routing back to bubbles.implement to (a) restore implementation from stash@{0} selectively, (b) commit the work, (c) hand back for verification.

Restoration round per bubbles.test routing. Selectively restored recipe_search implementation from stash@{0} ('pre-deploy-fix-2-WIP') via per-file `git checkout stash@{0} -- <path>` for tracked files and `git checkout stash@{0}^3 -- <path>` for untracked-in-stash new files. Restored 24 tracked modifications + 11 new files (incl. internal/agent/normalize.go + _test.go, internal/agent/tools/recipesearch/tool.go, internal/assistant/skills/recipesearch/{scenario,assembler}{,_test}.go, internal/assistant/contracts/testdata/golden/unavailable_no_match_no_capture.json, internal/telegram/assistant_adapter/bot_recipe_search_test.go, config/prompt_contracts/recipe-search-v1.yaml, tests/e2e/assistant_recipe_flow_test.go). Did NOT restore intermingled unrelated WIP (.github/bubbles/* framework files, deploy/compose.deploy.yml, config/prompt_contracts/weather-query-v1.yaml). Note: user's restore list omitted internal/agent/tools/recipesearch/tool.go — included it because the assembler imports it and the prior round's history explicitly lists it; without it the build does not link. Validated on restored tree: ./smackerel.sh config generate (dev) OK, ./smackerel.sh config generate --env test OK (required to refresh test.env with new ASSISTANT_SKILLS_RECIPE_SEARCH_* keys), ./smackerel.sh check OK (scenario-lint 9 scenarios 0 rejected), ./smackerel.sh test unit --go OK (all packages pass). Staged exactly the 35 recipe_search files (verified via `git diff --cached --name-status`; bug folder state.json/report.md updates intentionally excluded from this commit). Committed as 39be6ec2 'fix(BUG-061-003): restore recipe_search skill implementation' and pushed to origin/main so the work is durable. Handing back to bubbles.test for live-stack integration + e2e verification.

Restored-tree verification round at HEAD 39be6ec2. Confirmed all 8 expected restored recipe_search files on disk. Ran `./smackerel.sh test integration` — exit 1 with exactly the 4 previously-enumerated unrelated failures (TestScope10_ScenarioLint env-plumbing, TestDriveConfigGenerateAndRuntimeValidationStayInSync SCOPE-06c regex drift, TestAgentProviderDefaultModelTestOverride tier expectation, TestCLIAuthPassthrough_* docker-in-container missing). NO recipe_search package failure. Ran `./smackerel.sh test e2e` — shell block 36/36 PASS, Go block FAIL on 2 packages: tests/e2e/drive (same unrelated SCOPE-06c drift, mirrored from integration) AND tests/e2e/assistant_recipe_flow_test.go::TestE2E_MealPlanShoppingList_PopulatedAfterRecipeAssign (the new S05 test). S05 verbatim: 'GET http://localhost:8080/api/health: dial tcp [::1]:8080: connect: connection refused'. Root cause: the recipe e2e test reads SMACKEREL_BASE_URL with fallback http://localhost:8080 and only skips on missing DATABASE_URL; the canonical e2e runner sets CORE_EXTERNAL_URL (per tests/e2e/browser_history_e2e_test.go::loadE2EConfig) and the test stack publishes the core API on CORE_HOST_PORT=45001, not 8080. DATABASE_URL is set in the e2e env file so the test does not skip; it falls back to the wrong URL and refuses. Per-scenario verdict — S01/S02/S03/S04 PASS (interpreted from prior implement-round unit logs; the recipe_search unit packages have not changed since 39be6ec2), S05 FAIL (executed). Per scope DoD: all 5 must pass, S05 is recipe_search-attributable (new test added by this bug). Verdict 🛑 NOT_TESTED. Routing back to bubbles.implement with specific remediation: switch tests/e2e/assistant_recipe_flow_test.go to the canonical loadE2EConfig(t) helper (env contract CORE_EXTERNAL_URL + SMACKEREL_AUTH_TOKEN), then re-hand to bubbles.test for an S05-only re-run. No production-code change implied; the recipe_search skill, router normalization, assembler override, and Telegram adapter regression remain proven by S01–S04 unit coverage.

S05 test-wiring fix per bubbles.test remediation. Switched tests/e2e/assistant_recipe_flow_test.go to use the canonical loadE2EConfig(t) helper from tests/e2e/browser_history_e2e_test.go (env contract CORE_EXTERNAL_URL + SMACKEREL_AUTH_TOKEN with clean skip-on-absent semantics); removed the SMACKEREL_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8080 fallback, the DATABASE_URL skip, and the unused os import. No production-code change. Validated: `go vet -tags=e2e ./tests/e2e/...` exit 0; `./smackerel.sh test e2e` shows S05 PASS — `--- PASS: TestE2E_MealPlanShoppingList_PopulatedAfterRecipeAssign (2.08s)` at /tmp/bug061003-e2e-fix.out lines 1138-1139. Only remaining e2e failure is the unrelated pre-existing TestDriveFoundationE2E_MissingRequiredConfigFailsLoudly (tests/e2e/drive SCOPE-06c drift) explicitly out-of-scope per the routed remediation. Committing as a single fix commit (the one test file) and handing back to bubbles.test for per-scope DoD re-verification.

Per-scope DoD re-verification round at HEAD d0266558 (descendant of restoration commit 39be6ec2 + S05 test-wiring fix). Re-executed S01–S04 via `./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run '<8-test selector>' --verbose` → 8 PASS / 0 FAIL / 0 SKIP (raw log /tmp/bug061003-s1234.out): TestNormalizeForRouting_AliasMap PASS, TestRouter_NormalizesBeforeEmbed_BUG061003 PASS, TestRecipeAssembler_S01_PopulatesSources PASS, TestRecipeAssembler_S03_EmptyGraph_OverrideUnavailable_Adversarial PASS, TestRecipeAssembler_NonOKOutcome_NoOverride PASS, TestRecipeSearchScenarioContract_BUG061003 PASS, TestHandleUpdate_RecipeSearch_NotSavedAsIdea_BUG061003_S04 PASS, TestSavedAsIdeaRegex_AdversarialMatchesPreFixReply_BUG061003 PASS. Re-executed S05 via `./smackerel.sh test e2e --go-run 'TestE2E_MealPlanShoppingList_PopulatedAfterRecipeAssign'` against the live test stack (raw log /tmp/bug061003-s5.out) → `--- PASS: TestE2E_MealPlanShoppingList_PopulatedAfterRecipeAssign (2.53s)`, 0 FAIL lines, test stack torn down cleanly. Per-scenario verdict: S01 PASS, S02 PASS, S03 PASS, S04 PASS, S05 PASS — all executed (Claim Source: executed) on d0266558; prior round's S01–S04 'interpreted' hedge retired. Per-scope DoD satisfied. Unrelated failure surface (4 integration + 1 e2e/drive) not re-executed because the d0266558 delta vs 39be6ec2 is one test file that cannot affect them; attribution recorded in the prior bubbles.test round stands. Verdict ✅ TESTED. Routing nextRequiredOwner=bubbles.regression per bugfix-fastlane.phaseOrder (next phase after `test` is `regression`, owned by bubbles.regression per .github/bubbles/agent-capabilities.yaml). Bug-folder report.md updated with verbatim PASS evidence for all 5 scenarios.

Cross-feature regression sweep at HEAD d0266558 across the 37-file diff `git diff --name-only 39be6ec2^ d0266558`. Step 1 (baseline): `./smackerel.sh test unit --go` re-run on d0266558 → all Go packages OK (`[go-unit] go test ./... finished OK`); integration + e2e suites NOT re-executed because the d0266558 delta vs 39be6ec2 is one test-only file (tests/e2e/assistant_recipe_flow_test.go) which cannot affect the unrelated failure surface — carry-over attributions stand. Step 2 (cross-spec impact): `grep -rln 'recipe_search' specs/ | grep -v BUG-061-003` → zero matches. The hyphenated `recipe-search` in specs/036-meal-planning/scopes.md refers to the meal-plan recipe-search tool from spec 035 (different namespace, no collision). Schema-conformant scenarios.yaml block (mirrors header schema at L12); slash_shortcut="" per D3 (no collision with /ask, /weather, /remind, /reset); SST keys `assistant.skills.recipe_search.*` + `assistant.rate_limit.recipe_search.*` are additive under existing assistant.* tree; new contracts.ErrNoMatch + ResponseOverride do not collide with existing closed-vocabulary entries (response_test.go enforces count); prompt_contracts/recipe-search-v1.yaml mirrors retrieval-qa-v1.yaml shape; router NormalizeForRouting only wraps env.RawInput at the embed seam with envelope.RawInput preserved. Conflicts: 0. Step 3 (design coherence): SourceAssembly.Override field + facade-side skip-gate branch implement BUG-061-003 D5 verbatim; Override path narrowly scoped to Outcome=OK with empty answer+citations and emits StatusUnavailable+ErrNoMatch (semantically a more specific gate-refusal, not a contradiction of design §4.3); assembler-before-gate ordering is the pre-existing SCOPE-04 contract and the only logically possible one. Contradictions: 0. Step 4 (UI flow integrity): Telegram adapter routes recipe-intent input via normalize → recipe_search scenario (proven by S04); non-recipe input traverses normalize as identity → BandLow → idea-capture (proven by S02 adversarial regex); routerAliases is locked at 4 entries per D2. UI regressions: 0. Step 5 (coverage): every new branch in normalize.go, recipesearch tool/assembler/scenario, contracts.ErrNoMatch+ResponseOverride, facade Override branch, telegram adapter, and tests/e2e/assistant_recipe_flow has at least one targeted unit or e2e test; the one JSON-unmarshal-fail branch in the assembler returns zero-value SourceAssembly and routes through the existing provenance gate (same path as a missing assembler — not a regression risk, flagged as a minor known coverage gap). Step 6 (deployment): no files under deploy/, .github/workflows/build.yml, or scripts/deploy/ changed; config/smackerel.yaml additions are additive SST keys with no Build-Once Deploy-Many impact (N/A). Cross-spec unrelated failure carry-over (TestScope10_ScenarioLint env-plumbing, TestDriveConfigGenerateAndRuntimeValidationStayInSync SCOPE-06c drift, TestAgentProviderDefaultModelTestOverride tier resolver, TestCLIAuthPassthrough_* docker-in-container missing, TestDriveFoundationE2E_MissingRequiredConfigFailsLoudly) remains routed to their owning specs and is NOT in scope for BUG-061-003. Verdict 🟢 REGRESSION_FREE. Claim Source: executed for the unit-test re-run on d0266558; interpreted for the carry-over set (no production code changed in the d0266558 delta). Routing nextRequiredOwner=bubbles.simplify per bugfix-fastlane.phaseOrder (phase after `regression` is `simplify`). Bug-folder report.md appended with full per-step evidence under `## Phase: regression (bubbles.regression, 2026-05-30)`.

Resolved the single carry-forward gap surfaced by bubbles.simplify (recipe-search-score-field-unpopulated, low) via option (b) — dropped `score` from `recipeSearchHit` struct and from outputSchema required/properties in internal/agent/tools/recipesearch/tool.go, with a comment documenting the upstream api.SearchResult constraint (no numeric score surfaced; only qualitative Relevance string) and the reversibility path. Option (a) (thread score through SearchEngine) was rejected as disproportionately invasive (would touch SQL layer + api.SearchResult + every existing consumer including drive/qf/web/retrieval_qa + OpenAPI surface) for a field with zero downstream consumers (verified `grep -r 'recipeSearchHit|recipesearch.*\.Score' internal/` → no matches). Option (c) (placeholder) rejected as Principle 8 violation. Verification (executed on this round): `go build ./...` exit 0; `go test ./internal/agent/... ./internal/assistant/... ./internal/telegram/...` all PASS (internal/telegram 28.148s; assistant_adapter, skills/recipesearch, agent all OK); `./smackerel.sh check` → scenario-lint 9/0, env_file drift OK, SST in sync. Cross-checks performed against shipped tree at d0266558 + this patch: (1) Design D1–D10 — all 10 decisions honored (SST key placement D1, closed alias map D2 4 entries, no /recipe shortcut D3, prompt-contract location D4, empty-graph Override D5, graph-query via existing SearchEngine D6, manifest entry shape D7, regression contract D8 5/5 PASS, Principle 6 D9 no new notifications, Principle 8 D10 strengthened by removing the unpopulated score claim); (2) User expectation (verbatim 'find recepies, extract ingridients, make shopping list, remind, etc.') — sub-issues 1+2 covered in this bug (S01/S02/S04 PASS), sub-issues 3+4 covered by pre-existing mealplan code (S05 E2E PASS), sub-issue 5 correctly routed to spec 036; (3) Edge cases — stale graph results inherit lifecycle policy from spec 025 (no new gap), auth-token absence handled by Telegram adapter user-mapping gate + `recipe_search_missing_user_id` handler guard, ML sidecar down propagates as `recipe_search_engine_error` → Override does not fire → existing provenance-gate refusal (same as any skill on sidecar failure). Observations recorded (non-blocking): Finding 3 — bug folder lacks spec.md/design.md/scopes.md/scenario-manifest.json/uservalidation.md on disk (pre-existing Bug Artifacts Gate gap from bubbles.bug phase; content preserved inline in report.md + state.json executionHistory; routed to bubbles.bug per gaps-agent diagnostic-only artifact ownership policy). Finding 5 item 3 — assembler JSON-unmarshal-fail branch has no dedicated test (deterministically routes through existing provenance gate, same as missing assembler; re-attribution of regression Step 5 observation; routed to bubbles.harden). Verdict ✅ GAP_FREE for production code. Routing nextRequiredOwner=bubbles.harden per bugfix-fastlane.phaseOrder (phase after `gaps` is `harden`). Bug-folder report.md appended with full per-finding evidence under `## Phase: gaps (bubbles.gaps, 2026-05-30)`.
